task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a MySQL/MariaDB prompt (e.g., 'MariaDB [(none)]>' or 'MariaDB [socioboard]>') after logging in as root.

task_completion.description: Agent added the 'last_login_ip' column to the 'user_details' table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL query execution showing 'ALTER TABLE user_details ADD COLUMN last_login_ip VARCHAR(45);' (or similar) with a success message, or a 'DESCRIBE user_details;' output showing the new 'last_login_ip' column.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the Sequelize ORM model file for 'user_details'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, or VS Code) or terminal output showing the contents of the file at '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/library/sequelize-cli/models/user_details.js'.

task_completion.description: Agent added the 'last_login_ip' property to the Sequelize model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows 'last_login_ip: DataTypes.STRING(45)' (or similar valid Sequelize syntax) added to the model definition inside 'user_details.js'.

task_completion.description: Agent restarted the backend microservices using pm2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'pm2 restart' command execution (e.g., 'pm2 restart all' or specific service names) and the PM2 status table showing the services are online.

integrity.description: The database modification was actually executed on the MariaDB server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Query OK' confirmation message from MariaDB or the output of a 'DESCRIBE' command showing the column exists, rather than just an unexecuted SQL string typed in a prompt or text editor.

integrity.description: The ORM model file modification was actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for editor save confirmations (e.g., 'Wrote X lines' in nano) or a subsequent terminal command (like cat or grep) showing the changes exist in the actual file.

integrity.description: The PM2 restart command was executed and affected the actual services.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PM2 status table should list actual Socioboard-related services with updated restart counts or uptime, not a mocked output or empty PM2 list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected target column is 'last_login_ip' with type 'varchar(45)'. The Sequelize ORM model file to be modified is located exactly at '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/library/sequelize-cli/models/user_details.js'.
